reviews.review_msg: he is hard, doesn't explain material very well, always skips the main points in the textbook.kk

This professor is consistently rude and dismissive. Questions are met with sarcasm or eye-rolling, and it feels like you're being talked down to rather than taught. Office hours are uncomfortable and unhelpful, as they seem irritated that students even show up. The material could be interesting, but the hostile attitude makes it hard.

Would not recommend. Lectures are all over the place and rarely match the exams. The professor reads straight off the slides and doesn't explain things clearly. Asking questions feels pointless because answers are vague or dismissive. Grading is harsh and inconsistent, with very little feedback.
His teaching style is very different and difficult to understand. The exams are not what he teaches. He does however have knowledge about the topic but his accent makes it hard.
beware of the positive reviews they are setting up a trap

Engaging lectures.
Homework marked based on effort combination of Canvas and Pearson assignments.

Tests are fair - he tells you what's on it lol

GO TO LECTURE; if you don't, do be surprised you fail lol.

No pictures in his class so your notes have to be written/typed.

He is an excellent educator, and highly qualified individual. He incorporates stories from his actual experiences and what you learn is directly applicable to real life. Was the class difficult? Yes, but tax is difficult and so is the CFE. Growth requires you to be uncomfortable sometimes... and I'm okay with that.
Choose another instructor rather than her please!
